---
title: "Regression Tests"
description: "Use the live OPALX regression dashboard as the compatibility and example baseline."
audience: developer
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

The maintained regression suite is the best source of complete input files
that exercise the current parser and implementation.

[Open the live OPALX regression-test dashboard]({{< meta regression-tests-url >}})

When documenting a feature, link its regression case and explain what metric
the test protects. A test that only checks process completion should be
strengthened with a physically meaningful observable where practical.
